title: Need More Ores
description: Elevate your Minecraft experience with the 'Need More Ores' Mine rubies, craft stunning blocks and tools, and earn advancements on your journey to become a true ruby miner.
body:
# Need More Ores
**Need More Ores Mod** adds exciting new resources and tools to enhance your Minecraft experience. Discover two unique ores **Ruby** and **Tin** each bringing its own set of tools and armor.

Ruby Ore spawns between levels -64 and -22, offering Ruby Fragments that can be crafted into Rubies. Equip yourself with Ruby Armor and wield tools like the Ruby Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, and Hoe.

Tin Ore appears at levels -32 to 256, providing a complete set of Tin Armor and tools, including the Tin Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, and Hoe.

Progress further in the game with new advancements centered around Ruby, adding an extra layer of achievement to your exploration and crafting.
